title: Sign the Contract
description: Captain Roderick Steele of the Iron Company is reviewing applications for new recruits. The mercenary life is brutal and demands discipline. Prove your combat prowess in a trial against company soldiers, and if you survive with honor, you'll earn a place among the Iron Company's ranks.

objectives.description: Speak to Captain Steele at the Iron Hall in Dalhurst
Defeat the training soldiers in combat trial
Report to Captain Steele with your results
